title: Poke the Bear - The R&D Philosophy
content: Ha! When I was running research at Vanguard, my motto was 'poke the bear.' [chuckle] Question everything, especially the things everyone assumes are settled. We'd sit around throwing out ideas and the team started calling our craziest ones 'DeLoreans with flux capacitors' - you know, from Back to the Future? Wild, time-travel-level ideas that might actually work. And you know what? Some of them did. Some became products managing billions. The lesson? Don't let 'that's how we've always done it' stop you from asking 'but what if we tried this instead?'
follow_up: The thing about research is, ninety percent of your ideas won't work. But that ten percent? That's where the magic happens. You have to be willing to look a little foolish to discover something new.
